class="wrap"><h2 id="six-steps-title" class="title">6 passos para automatizar<br>seu WhatsApp na Lailla</h2><p class="sub">Em 11 minutos você terá seu WhatsApp<br>conversando sozinho com seus </g>
</svg></div><h3>Crie sua conta</h3><p>Crie sua conta na Lailla.io.</p></article><article class="card"><div class="icon" aria-hidden="true">
<img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSI1MTIiIGhlaWdodD0iNTEyIiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgNTEyIDUxMiI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgc3R5bGU9ImZpbGw6I2NmZDRkYjtmaWxsLW9wYWNpdHk6IDAuMTsiLz48L3N2Zz4=" width="512" height="512" decoding="async" data-src="https://lailla.io/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/icone-point-d-interrogation-question-violet.png" alt="Perguntas"></div><h3>Responda 6 perguntas</h3><p>Conte sobre seu negócio e objetivos.</p></article><article class="card"><div class="icon" aria-hidden="true">

</svg></div><h3>Pegue seu Agente IA</h3><p>Receba um agente personalizado.</p></article><article class="card"><div class="icon" aria-hidden="true">

</g>
</svg></div><h3>Escolha uma voz</h3><p>Sua voz ou do seu atendente.</p></article><article class="card"><div class="icon" aria-hidden="true">
<img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIyMjUiIGhlaWdodD0iMjI1IiB2aWV3Qm94PSIwIDAgMjI1IDIyNSI+PHJlY3Qgd2lkdGg9IjEwMCUiIGhlaWdodD0iMTAwJSIgc3R5bGU9ImZpbGw6I2NmZDRkYjtmaWxsLW9wYWNpdHk6IDAuMTsiLz48L3N2Zz4=" width="225" height="225" decoding="async" data-src="https://lailla.io/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/image-removebg-preview-1.png" alt="WhatsApp"></div><h3>Conecte ao WhatsApp</h3><p>Via QRCode de forma simples.</p></article><article class="card"><div class="icon" aria-hidden="true">

<path d="m16 11 2 2 4-4"></path>
</g>
</svg></div><h3>Está pronto!</h3><p>Atenda seus clientes sem precisar de equipe no WhatsApp.</p></article></div></div></section></div></div><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-3046b83 e-con-full e-flex e-con e-child" data-id="3046b83" data-element_type="container"><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-2c9259ac scroll-bottom elementor-tablet-align-center elementor-widget-tablet__width-initial elementor-widget elementor-widget-button" data-id="2c9259ac" data-element_type="widget" data-widget_type="button.default"><div class="elementor-widget-container"><div class="elementor-button-wrapper">

<img data-lazyloaded="1" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIxNjAwIiBoZWlnaHQ9Ijk5MCIgdmlld0JveD0iMCAwIDE2MDAgOTkwIj48cmVjdCB3aWR0aD0iMTAwJSIgaGVpZ2h0PSIxMDAlIiBzdHlsZT0iZmlsbDojY2ZkNGRiO2ZpbGwtb3BhY2l0eTogMC4xOyIvPjwvc3ZnPg==" width="1600" height="990" class="la-hero__img" data-src="https://lailla.io/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/Arte-automacao-3-Lailla.io_.png" alt="Integrações com CRM, Sistema e Agenda" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div><div class="la-hero__content"><h2 class="la-hero__title">Conecte seu CRM, Sistema ou Agenda</h2><p class="la-hero__text">

atualize seu CRM, busque informações em um sistema e agende pessoas de forma automática.</p></div></section></div></div></div><div class="elementor-element elementor-element-5fd25626 elementor-widget-tablet__width-initial elementor-invisible elementor-widget elementor-widget-html" data-id="5fd25626" data-element_type="widget" data-settings="{"_animation":"fadeInUp"}" data-widget_type="html.default"><div class="elementor-widget-container"><section class="lailla-vo-hero" data-scheme="light" aria-label="Clonagem de voz Lailla"><style>/* =========================================================
       🎨 CORES FÁCEIS DE MUDAR (edite aqui)
       Troque o atributo data-scheme="light" ↔ "dark" na <section>
       ou ajuste as variáveis abaixo.
       ========================================================= */
    .lailla-vo-hero[data-scheme="light"]{
      --page-bg:#ffffff;          /* fundo da seção */
      --panel:#ffffff;            /* cor dos cards (use #f3f5f8 p/ cinza) */
      --panel-border:#e1e6ec;     /* borda dos cards */
      --text:#111318;             /* textos fora dos cards */
      --muted:#6b7785;            /* textos secundários fora dos cards */
      --card-text:#111318;        /* textos dentro dos cards */
      --card-muted:#6b7785;       /* subtítulos dentro dos cards */
      --chip-bg:#ffffff;          /* fundo do chip */
      --chip-text:#111318;        /* texto do chip */
      --accent:#9901CC;           /* roxo principal */
      --accent-2:#b54ae6;         /* roxo gradiente */
      --glow:0 0 28px rgba(153,1,204,.25),0 0 80px rgba(153,1,204,.15);
      --radius-2xl:28px;
      --shadow-soft:0 18px 50px rgba(16,24,40,.12);

      /* controles finos */
      --wave-shift:36px;          /* desloca a onda p/ baixo do centro */
      --chip-inset:8px;           /* o quanto o chip entra no card */
    }
    .lailla-vo-hero[data-scheme="dark"]{
      --page-bg:#0b0f0e;
      --panel:#101614;
      --panel-border:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
      --text:#e9f4ef;
      --muted:#9fb2aa;
      --card-text:#e9f4ef;
      --card-muted:#b9c7c1;
      --chip-bg:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
      --chip-text:#e9f4ef;
      --accent:#9901CC;
      --accent-2:#b54ae6;
      --glow:0 0 28px rgba(153,1,204,.45),0 0 80px rgba(153,1,204,.25);
      --radius-2xl:28px;
      --shadow-soft:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.35);

      --wave-shift:36px;
      --chip-inset:8px;
    }

    /* ====== Base ====== */
    .lailla-vo-hero{
      background: var(--page-bg);
      color:var(--text);
      padding:clamp(48px,8vw,96px) 20px;
      font-family:ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,"Apple Color Emoji","Segoe UI Emoji";
    }
    .lailla-vo-wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;position:relative}

    /* ====== Heading ====== */
    .lailla-vo-title{
      font-size:clamp(28px,4.5vw,56px);line-height:1.08;text-align:center;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin:0 0 14px
    }
    .lailla-vo-title .accent{
      background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--accent-2) 0%,var(--accent) 55%,var(--accent) 100%);
      -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;color:transparent;
      text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(153,1,204,.25);
      white-space:nowrap
    }
    .lailla-vo-title .sparkle{font-size:.8em;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(153,1,204,.35));margin-left:4px}
    .lailla-vo-sub{text-align:center;color:var(--muted);font-size:clamp(14px,1.6vw,18px);margin:0 auto 44px;max-width:900px}

    /* ====== Grid + linha conectora ====== */
    .vo-grid{position:relative;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto 1fr;align-items:center;gap:clamp(18px,3vw,36px)}
    .vo-grid::before{
      content:"";position:absolute;left:8%;right:8%;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);height:2px;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent 0%, rgba(153,1,204,.15) 15%, rgba(153,1,204,.35) 50%, rgba(153,1,204,.15) 85%, transparent 100%);
      z-index:0; opacity:.5
    }

    /* ====== Chips (borda roxa, texto preto) ====== */
    .chip{
      display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
      background:var(--chip-bg);
      border:2px solid var(--accent);
      padding:6px 12px;border-radius:999px;
      font-weight:800;font-size:13px;color:var(--chip-text);
      box-shadow:0 6px 18px rgba(153,1,204,.18);
      z-index:3;
    }
    .chip .avatar-img{
      width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:999px;object-fit:cover;object-position:center;
      box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #ffffff, 0 0 0 4px rgba(153,1,204,.65);
      background:none !important;
    }

    /* 👉 Chip “meio dentro / meio fora” do card */
    .vo-card{ position:relative; }
    .vo-card .chip.in-card,
    .vo-card .chip.in-card.right{
      position:absolute !important;
      left:50%;
      top:var(--chip-inset);           /* quanto entra no card */
      transform:translate(-50%,-50%);  /* metade fora, metade dentro */
      margin:0;
    }

    /* ====== Cards (brancos/cinza) ====== */
    .vo-card{
      background:var(--panel);
      border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
      border-radius:var(--radius-2xl);
      box-shadow:0 1px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.04) inset, var(--shadow-soft);
      padding:clamp(24px,3vw,30px);
      padding-top:92px;                        /* respiro p/ chip sobreposto */
      width:min(480px,100%); min-height:340px;
      display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:space-between;
      color:var(--card-text);
      overflow:visible;
    }
    .timer{
      font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;font-feature-settings:"tnum";
      font-size:clamp(18px,2.4vw,24px);font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-align:center;margin-top:4px;
      color:var(--accent);
      position:relative; z-index:2;
    }
    .hint{ text-align:center; color:var(--card-muted); font-size:12px; margin-top:6px; position:relative; z-index:2; }

    /* ====== ONDA TELEFONIA (SVG animado) ====== */
    .tel-wave{
      --svg: url("data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' preserveAspectRatio='none'><path d='M0 30 C20 10 40 50 60 30 S100 10 120 30 S140 50 160 30 S180 10 200 30 S220 50 240 30' fill='none' stroke='%239901CC' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='0.9'/></svg>");
      --svg-soft: url(\"data:image/svg+xml;utf8,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 60' preserveAspectRatio='none'><path d='M0 30 C20 10 40 50 60 30 S100 10 120 30 S140 50 160 30 S180 10 200 30 S220 50 240 30' fill='none' stroke='%239901CC' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='0.35'/></svg>\");
      position:absolute; 
      top: calc(50% + var(--wave-shift));      /* desloca para não sobrepor o relógio */
      left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
      width:min(560px,84%); height:72px; margin:0; z-index:1; pointer-events:none;
      background-image: var(--svg);
      background-repeat: repeat-x; background-size: 240px 60px; background-position: 0 50%;
      animation: waveScroll 2.4s linear infinite;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgba(153,1,204,.22));
      opacity:.95;
    }
    .tel-wave::before,
    .tel-wave::after{
      content:""; position:absolute; inset:0;
      background-repeat: repeat-x; background-size:240px 60px; background-position:0 50%;
    }
    .tel-wave::before{ background-image: var(--svg-soft); animation: waveScroll 3.2s linear infinite; filter: blur(1px); }
    .tel-wave::after { background-image: var(--svg-soft); animation: waveScroll 4.6s linear infinite; filter: blur(6px); opacity:.55; }
    @keyframes waveScroll{ from{ background-position:0 50%; } to{ background-position:-240px 50%; } }

    /* ====== Botões ====== */
    .btn{width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:999px;border:none;display:grid;place-items:center;margin:4px auto 0;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .15s ease, box-shadow .2s ease; position:relative; z-index:2;}
    .btn:active{transform:scale(.98)}
    .btn.rec{background:radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, #ff8592, #ff3b4f);box-shadow:0 8px 26px rgba(255,59,79,.25)}
    .btn.rec::before{content:"";width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:999px;background:#fff;opacity:.22}
    .btn.play{background:#e8ecf1;border:1px solid #d6dde6;box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 6px rgba(15,23,32,.06);position:relative}
    .btn.play[data-state="pause"]::before,.btn.play[data-state="play"]::before,.btn.play[data-state="pause"]::after{content:"";position:absolute;background:#2b3540;border-radius:2px}
    .btn.play[data-state="pause"]::before{width:6px;height:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-9px)}
    .btn.play[data-state="pause"]::after{width:6px;height:18px;left:50%;transform:translateX(3px)}
    .btn.play[data-state="play"]::before{width:0;height:0;border-left:16px solid #2b3540;border-top:10px solid transparent;border-bottom:10px solid transparent;left:50%;transform:translateX(-6px)}

    /* ====== Núcleo "Vo" claro (card do meio) — SEM EFEITO ====== */
    .vo-core{
      position:relative;z-index:2;display:grid;place-items:center;gap:10px;text-align:center;
      padding:10px;min-width:140px;
      margin: 12px 0 44px;
    }
    .vo-badge{
      width:126px;height:126px;border-radius:22px;
      display:grid;place-items:center;
      background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff,#f5f7fa);
      border:1px solid var(--panel-border);
      box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(16,24,40,.10);
    }
    .vo-badge::before, .vo-badge::after { content:none !important; }
    .vo-img{ width:68%; height:68%; object-fit:contain; filter:none; }
    .vo-core small{color:var(--card-muted);font-size:12px}

    /* ====== 📱 MOBILE ====== */
    @media (max-width: 640px){
      .lailla-vo-hero{ --wave-shift:44px; }
      .vo-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
      /* (chips fora do card continuariam centralizados; aqui usamos in-card) */
      .vo-core{ margin-bottom: 64px; }
    }</style><div class="lailla-vo-wrap"><h1 class="lailla-vo-title">

  @keyframes intercom-lightweight-app-launcher {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: scale(0.5);
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: scale(1);
    }
  }

  @keyframes intercom-lightweight-app-gradient {
    from {
      opacity: 0;
    }
    to {
      opacity: 1;
    }
  }

  @keyframes intercom-lightweight-app-messenger {
    0% {
      opacity: 0;
      transform: scale(0);
    }
    40% {
      opacity: 1;
    }
    100% {
      transform: scale(1);
    }
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app {
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 2147483001;
    width: 0;
    height: 0;
    font-family: system-ui, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol";
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-gradient {
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 2147483002;
    width: 500px;
    height: 500px;
    bottom: 0;
    right: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
    background: radial-gradient(
      ellipse at bottom right,
      rgba(29, 39, 54, 0.16) 0%,
      rgba(29, 39, 54, 0) 72%);
    animation: intercom-lightweight-app-gradient 200ms ease-out;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher {
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 2147483003;
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    border: none;
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    max-width: 48px;
    width: 48px;
    max-height: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: undefined;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 6px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06), 0 2px 32px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.16);
    transition: transform 167ms cubic-bezier(0.33, 0.00, 0.00, 1.00);
    box-sizing: content-box;
  }


  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher:hover {
    transition: transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0.33, 0.00, 0.00, 1.00);
    transform: scale(1.1)
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher:active {
    transform: scale(0.85);
    transition: transform 134ms cubic-bezier(0.45, 0, 0.2, 1);
  }


  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher:focus {
    outline: none;

    
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 48px;
    height: 48px;
    transition: transform 100ms linear, opacity 80ms linear;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon-open {
    
        opacity: 1;
        transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1);
      
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon-open svg {
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon-open svg path {
    fill: undefined;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon-self-serve {
    
        opacity: 1;
        transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1);
      
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon-self-serve svg {
    height: 44px;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon-self-serve svg path {
    fill: undefined;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-custom-icon-open {
    max-height: 24px;
    max-width: 24px;

    
        opacity: 1;
        transform: rotate(0deg) scale(1);
      
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon-minimize {
    
        opacity: 0;
        transform: rotate(-60deg) scale(0);
      
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon-minimize svg path {
    fill: undefined;
  }

  /* Extended launcher styles */
  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher.intercom-launcher-extended {
    width: calc(180px - 30px);
    max-width: calc(180px - 30px);
    height: calc(45px - 26px);
    max-height: calc(45px - 26px);
    border-radius: 12px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    padding: 12px 16px 12px 12px !important;
    gap: 6px;
    /* Use theme background instead of hardcoded gradient */
    background: undefined;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
    box-shadow: 0px -2px 50px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher.intercom-launcher-extended .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-icon {
    position: relative;
    width: 24px;
    height: 24px;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-launcher-text {
    /* Match text color with launcher icon */
    color: undefined;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    max-width: 140px;
    opacity: 1;
    transition: opacity 80ms linear;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-messenger {
    position: fixed;
    z-index: 2147483003;
    overflow: hidden;
    background-color: #ffffff;
    animation: intercom-lightweight-app-messenger 250ms cubic-bezier(0, 1, 1, 1);
    transform-origin: bottom right;

    
        width: 400px;
        height: calc(100% - 40px);
        max-height: 704px;
        min-height: 250px;
        right: 20px;
        bottom: 20px;
        box-shadow: 0 5px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
      

    border-radius: 24px;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-messenger-header {
    height: 64px;
    border-bottom: none;
    background: #ffffff;
  }

  .intercom-lightweight-app-messenger-footer{
    position:absolute;
    bottom:0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 80px;
    background: #ffffff;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 21px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
    box-shadow: 0px 0px 25px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
  }

  @media print {
    .intercom-lightweight-app {
      display: none;
    }
  }
</style></div></body></html>
